arts.ttl: Lee Carsley makes England vow despite Greece failure: 'It didn’t come off but we go again'
arts.sum: Lee Carsley suffered the first setback of his interim tenure as England boss, with the embarrassing Wembley defeat to Greece a big blow to his hopes of being permanent manager - despite his continued refusal to discuss it

arts.ttl: I’m not the hierarchy – Pickford has no clue about impact on Carsley job chances
arts.sum: Carsley’s chances of becoming Gareth Southgate’s permanent successor took a severe blow on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford insists England ‘weren’t far off’ despite dismal Greece defeat
arts.sum: The goalkeeper watched on as an attacking line-up misfired in a 2-1 defeat to Greece at Wembley

arts.ttl: Late McAtee double gives England U21s Euro qualifying win over Ukraine
arts.sum: James McAtee's double saw England claim a 2-1 victory over Ukraine in their European U21 Championship qualifier at the Vitality Stadium.

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford makes bizarre claim in wake of England's humiliation at Wembley
arts.sum: The Everton goalkeeper was one of many to have a night to forget against the Greeks but still insists Lee Carsley's side controlled the game

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford makes surprise claim over failed England experiment against Greece: 'Not far off'
arts.sum: Three Lions goalkeeper saw positive signs amid the chaos at Wembley despite damaging defeat

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel in England 'talks' after Lee Carsley fluffs his lines in Three Lions audition
arts.sum: The German boss has been out of work since losing his job at Bayern Munich back in May

arts.ttl: Tuchel 'in talks' with England as Man Utd dealt hammer blow
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel is in talks to become the next permanent England manager, according to reports in Germany. Southgate resigned as England boss following their 2-1 defeat to Spain in the 2024 European Championship final, and U21 manager Lee Carsley was handed the reins on an interim basis.

arts.ttl: No strikers & false nines - an experiment that ended in failure
arts.sum: England start with a false nine experiment, end up in a rudimentary 4-4-2 shape, and lose to Greece on a damaging night for Lee Carsley's job prospects.

arts.ttl: England interim boss Lee Carsley keen to stick with his attacking ideology
arts.sum: Thursday’s Nations League clash with Greece began with hopeful expectation and ended with boos after the 2-1 defeat at Wembley.
